steps.title: Find the 1960 and 1970 minimum wages
steps.content: From the table, in 1960 the minimum wage was \$1.00 per hour, and in 1970 it was \$1.60 per hour.

steps.title: Apply the percent increase formula
steps.content:
Using the formula with old value = \$1.00 and new value = \$1.60:
$$\frac{1.60 - 1.00}{1.00} \times 100\% = \frac{0.60}{1.00} \times 100\% = 60\%$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
